creator: marklmi26-fbsd@yahoo.com
text:
(In reply to Dennis Friedrichsen from comment #9)

Given the Sep 3, 2020 13:11:43 EEPROM content for the
failure, it seems unlikely that anyone will try to
reproduce the problem when the current EEPROM tagged
release results in a working environment.

In fact, the EEPROM content and the RPi*  firmware
vintages are not fully independent. It seems likely
that the combination spanned an incompatibility
point. But no one is likely to investigate to be
sure. (It is very messy to do so.)

In other words, given the details, closing this
bugzilla entry is likely the thing to do.
